title: lepidium draba var. repens
intro: Lepidium draba var. repens, also known as crepis root or creeping whitetop, is a variety of the Lepidium draba plant, a member of the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lepidium draba var. repens include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. It can be prepared as a tea or tincture for use in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
